prompt: I need a REST API for a recipe sharing app using ElysiaJS. Set up routes for recipes: GET /api/recipes with query params for search (q), cuisine filter, and pagination (page, limit). POST /api/recipes to create a recipe with body validation — title (required string 3-100 chars), description (optional), ingredients (array of strings, min 1 item), cook_time_minutes (positive integer), cuisine (one of 'italian', 'mexican', 'japanese', 'indian', 'american'). Add proper Typebox validation on all inputs and typed error responses for 400/404.
